demographics.living_situation: lives at home with both parents

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: He strained to poop, suddenly turned dark blue around the lips, and is gasping for air. (Spoken by the father — the patient is our 6-month-old baby.)
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on within about half an hour after he strained doing a poo and it is getting worse, not better — he has had small blue turns before that settled on their own but this one won't stop.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 30 minutes ago, right after he strained hard during a bowel movement
symptom_narrative.duration: roughly half an hour and worsening
symptom_narrative.character: his lips and mouth went dark blue, he is breathing very fast and gasping, sweating a lot, and is extremely upset and crying and cannot be settled
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the parents say this is far worse than his usual little blue turns and they are terrified
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: his lips, mouth and face are blue; his whole body is working hard to breathe
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant since it started, not easing
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing so far — his previous small spells settled by themselves but this one is not
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: it started with the straining and has kept getting worse on its own
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: very fast breathing, gasping, heavy sweating, extreme agitation and inconsolable crying, becoming less interactive
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: a few brief milder blue spells in the past that resolved on their own within a minute or two
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: totally dependent infant; parents report he has always fed poorly and is small for his age

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: born with a heart problem — the doctors found a hole in his heart and a heart murmur, and he is waiting for heart surgery
past_medical_history.how_managed: under the children's heart team, no regular heart medicines yet, awaiting an operation

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: poor feeding and slow weight gain since birth (small for his age)

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: 6-month-old infant, lives with both parents; a parent is present and made the call

paediatric_context.developmental_concerns: poor feeding and failure to thrive since birth reported by parents

objective_data_offered.value: lips, mouth and nail beds look dark blue; baby is breathing very fast with the chest and ribs sucking in, and is sweaty and very distressed
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: carer video over a phone; lighting and camera quality limit how reliably colour and breathing effort can be judged

objective_data_offered.value: the blue turn started right after he strained during a bowel movement; he is crying hard and cannot be settled and seems to be interacting less than usual
the parents have been holding him lying flat on his back
